name: Textured Glass Soap Pump Blue - Threshold™
description:
Add a luxurious and functional touch to your bathroom with this Textured Glass Soap Pump from Threshold™. Made of glass, this soap pump features a gold-tone base and dispenser for elegant charm, while the bubble-like raised design adds an aquatic touch. Compatible with lotions and liquid soaps, this 9.8-fluid-ounce soap pump in blue is a must-have addition to your bathroom.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
